parameters.subject: =We received your property inquiry — Premier Realty
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json.Name.split(' ')[0]}},

Thank you for reaching out to Premier Realty.

We received your inquiry about a {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json["Property Type"] }} property with a budget of ₱{{ Number($('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json["Budget"]).toLocaleString('en-PH') }} and a timeline of {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json.Timeline }}.

Your inquiry has been assigned to one of our sales specialists:

Assigned Agent: {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json["Assigned Agent"] }}

Our team will review your request and contact you as soon as possible to assist with the next steps.

Best regards,
Premier Realty Team

value.Description: =Acknowledgement email sent to {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json["Email"] }}
value.Notes: Automated confirmation email sent after lead was created in CRM.

value.Description: =Telegram notification sent to {{ $('CRM: Create Lead Record').item.json["Assigned Agent"] }}
value.Notes: Assigned agent received lead details, AI score, priority, and recommended action.

value.Description: =First follow-up task scheduled for {{ $now.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }}
value.Notes: Follow-up task automatically created in the Follow-Ups sheet.
